title: abutilon trisulcatum
intro: Abutilon trisulcatum, also known as the Indian mallow or velvet leaf, is a medicinal plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Abutilon trisulcatum include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
